# Third-party graph-export licenses

The standalone graph export bundles the following unmodified JavaScript
artifacts. Their source, version, and SHA-256 are recorded here so the wheel
can be audited without network access.

| Artifact | Version | Source | SHA-256 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| cytoscape.min.js | 3.30.2 | https://registry.npmjs.org/cytoscape/-/cytoscape-3.30.2.tgz | `83e8c54a6bec655bfd81df07df605649c268af69aeca67a5ea2da54ea42dac81` |
| dagre.min.js | 0.8.5 | https://registry.npmjs.org/dagre/-/dagre-0.8.5.tgz | `62eb9787ccfdbdf4148d4d99d31dbf9ee4770eafee81e637d759b52aac22cd51` |
| cytoscape-dagre.js | 2.5.0 | https://registry.npmjs.org/cytoscape-dagre/-/cytoscape-dagre-2.5.0.tgz | `bf70fe402991dcbff33e05a7e4a5271c78020bb75e85d1c80ab7538e4157112e` |

Each artifact is distributed under the MIT License. The copyright notices
below are reproduced from the corresponding npm package licenses.
